sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Set up the Next.js web application project structure and initialize the repository with necessary configurations.
Coder Agent: Create the basic UI components for the web application including header, footer, and navigation.
Tester Agent: Define the test plan for the web application, including functional, performance, and security testing requirements.
Reviewer Agent: Establish code review guidelines and standards for the web application development process.
Devops (docker) Agent: Create a Dockerfile for the Next.js web application to enable containerization.
Coder Agent: Implement QR code scanning functionality for the web application using a third-party library.
Coder Agent: Integrate multi-language support into the web application using i18next or similar framework.
Coder Agent: Apply SEO optimization techniques to the web application including meta tags, structured data, and sitemap generation.
Tester Agent: Conduct end-to-end testing of the QR code scanning feature on the web application.
Tester Agent: Perform localization testing for the multi-language support in the web application.
Reviewer Agent: Review the implementation of QR code scanning and multi-language support for adherence to coding standards.
Devops (deployer) Agent: Prepare the staging environment for deployment of the web application.
